rules.rule: Brokers must expose external failures by throwing — not by converting them into UI messages.
Foundation services must catch broker exceptions and re-throw as domain-specific exceptions.
View services may convert service errors into view-friendly error models.
Pages must render an error state explicitly — not silently render nothing.
Components must not inspect raw infrastructure errors (error.status, error.code).
Errors must never be silently swallowed without logging or re-throwing.
Unexpected suppressed errors must be logged through an approved logging broker.
